extraction.one_line_summary: VLASOV attacked final 2km after FUGLSANG split GC group on penultimate climb, took stage and leader's jersey while EVENEPOEL lost 2+ minutes
tactical_patterns: Israel Premier Tech split GC group on penultimate climb 4km out, ideal setup for FUGLSANG sprint finish.
EVENEPOEL dropped on penultimate ascent and never regained contact, revealing vulnerability on repeated shorter climbs in heat.
SCHACHMANN leading out teammate VLASOV in final 300m demonstrates Bora's willingness to sacrifice GC podium for stage.
Ineos sacrificed YATES early (COVID), yet THOMAS still contested finale suggesting reduced team support doesn't eliminate contention.

rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: positive: Won sprint from reduced group after positioning in final 2km, takes yellow jersey with 6-second advantage
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: Dropped on penultimate climb at 4km to go, lost over 2 minutes indicating poor heat/repeated effort tolerance
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: Split GC group with attack on penultimate climb, finished 2nd showing late-career resurgence on selective finales
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: Reached front group without team support (YATES absent), contested finale but couldn't win sprint
rider_signals.HIRSCHI Marc: negative: UAE set tempo early for him but dropped before finale, ineffective on selective repeated climbs
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: Desperately trying to hang on during earlier climbs, suggests wrong parcours for his characteristics
rider_signals.DILLIER Silvan: positive: Survived 50km break until 14.5km to go in 36-degree heat as Swiss champion
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: neutral: Led out VLASOV in finale sacrificing own GC placement, strong team-first riding
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: positive: Present in five-rider finale group, positioned well on selective climbs
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: positive: Finished in top-10 group after selective finale, handled repeated efforts well
